description: Send an email from the user's Gmail account, or reply to an existing message. This sends real email to real recipients — always confirm the recipient, subject, and body with the user before calling, and never invent recipient addresses.

to.description: Recipient email address (comma-separated for several). Omit when replying — the original sender is used.

subject.description: Subject line. Omit when replying — 'Re:' is added automatically.

reply_to_message_id.description: Gmail message id to reply to (from gmail_search). Sets threading headers and keeps the conversation together.
